root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_project_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_name w2, tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_id ne_id, tia_alarm_dict.txt w3, tfa_alarm_project_sum.network_type_top network_type_top, tfa_alarm_project_sum.alarm_proj_num w4 from tfa_alarm_project_sum tfa_alarm_project_sum, tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_project_sum.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type=1317 and tfa_alarm_project_sum.first_result =to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_project_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_id in (#areaID#) )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql:
select count(*) from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_project_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_name w2, tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_id ne_id, tia_alarm_dict.txt w3, tfa_alarm_project_sum.network_type_top network_type_top, tfa_alarm_project_sum.alarm_proj_num w4 from tfa_alarm_project_sum tfa_alarm_project_sum, tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_project_sum.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type=1317 and tfa_alarm_project_sum.first_result =to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_project_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_project_sum.ne_id in (#areaID#)
)

Conditions.Condition: select distinct province_name as text,province_id as value from region_city_local union all select distinct region_name as text, region_id as value from region_city_local

root.detailSql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_project_detail.first_result ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_project_detail.region_name w2, tia_alarm_dict1.txt w3, tfa_alarm_project_detail.vendor_name w4, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w5, tfa_alarm_project_detail.eqp_label w6, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w7, tfa_alarm_project_detail.ne_label w8, to_char(tfa_alarm_project_detail.event_time ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w9, tfa_alarm_project_detail.alarm_title_text w10, tfa_alarm_project_detail.vendor_severity w11, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w12, tfa_alarm_project_detail.probable_cause w13 from tfa_alarm_project_detail tfa_alarm_project_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1317) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.eqp_object_class=tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.object_class=tia_alarm_dict3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=6) tia_alarm_dict4 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.org_severity=tia_alarm_dict4.id where tfa_alarm_project_detail.first_result =to_date('@w1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_project_detail.network_type_top =@network_type_top@ and (tfa_alarm_project_detail.region_id=@ne_id@ or tfa_alarm_project_detail.province_id=@ne_id@) {0} )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.detailCountSql: select count(*) from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_project_detail.first_result ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_project_detail.region_name w2, tia_alarm_dict1.txt w3, tfa_alarm_project_detail.vendor_name w4, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w5, tfa_alarm_project_detail.eqp_label w6, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w7, tfa_alarm_project_detail.ne_label w8, to_char(tfa_alarm_project_detail.event_time ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w9, tfa_alarm_project_detail.alarm_title_text w10, tfa_alarm_project_detail.vendor_severity w11, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w12, tfa_alarm_project_detail.probable_cause w13 from tfa_alarm_project_detail tfa_alarm_project_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1317) tia_alarm_dict1 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.network_type_top=tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.eqp_object_class=tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.object_class=tia_alarm_dict3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=6) tia_alarm_dict4 on tfa_alarm_project_detail.org_severity=tia_alarm_dict4.id where tfa_alarm_project_detail.first_result =to_date('@w1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_project_detail.network_type_top =@network_type_top@ and (tfa_alarm_project_detail.region_id=@ne_id@ or tfa_alarm_project_detail.province_id=@ne_id@) {0} )
